alternative_route: If you are on the street:  Take an East Elmhurst-bound Q69 bus or Flushing-bound Q66 to 21 St/36 Av and then take a Roosevelt Island-bound Q102 bus to Main St for the Roosevelt Island M station. Note: F runs via Roosevelt Island during Nights and Weekends.  If you are on the mezzanine:  Take a Manhattan-bound train to Roosevelt Island and then take a Court Sq-bound Q102 to 21 St/36 Av. Transfer to a Queens Plaza-bound Q69 or Q66 to 21 St/41 Av.

alternative_route: If you are on the mezzanine:  Weekdays from 6 AM to 9:30 PM: Take a Forest Hills-bound M to Northern Blvd and transfer to a Manhattan-bound M.  Nights and Weekends: Take a Jamaica-bound F to Jackson Hts-Roosevelt Av and transfer to a Manhattan-bound F. If you are on the platform:  Take a Manhattan-bound train to Roosevelt Island and transfer to a Forest Hills-bound M (Jamaica-bound F Nights, Weekends) to 21 St-Queensbridge.

notes: mezzanine to Jamaica-bound platform
alternative_route: If you are on the mezzanine:  Take a Manhattan-bound train to Roosevelt Island and transfer to a Forest Hills-bound M (Jamaica-bound F Nights, Weekends).  If you are on the platform:  Weekdays from 6 AM to 9:30 pm: Take a Forest Hills-bound M to Northern Blvd and transfer to a Manhattan-bound M to 21 St - Queensbridge.  Nights and Weekends: Take a Jamaica-bound F to Jackson Hts-Roosevelt Av and transfer to a Manhattan-bound F to 21 St - Queensbridge.

notes: mezzanine to platform for service in both directions
alternative_route: If you are on the mezzanine: Exit faregate and use elevator to exit station.  Then, take a Jamaica-bound Q54 orQ56 (Jamaica and Van Wyck Expwy) to Jamaica Av and 147 Pl.  Proceed two block south to Sutphin Blvd and Jamaica Av.  Use elevators to enter the Sutphin Blvd-Archer Av E/J/Z Station. If you are on the platform: Take a Jamaica-bound E to Sutphin Blvd-Archer Av E/J/Z Station.  Use elevators to exit staton and take a Lafayette Av-bound Q24 or a Williamsburg Bridge Plz-bound Q54 (Jamaica Av & Sutphin Blvd) to Jamaica-Van Wyck E Station.

notes: 89 Ave & Van Wyck Expwy (SW corner) to mezzanine for service in both directions
alternative_route: If you are on the street: Take a Jamaica-bound Q54 or Q56 (Jamaica and Van Wyck Expwy) to Jamaica Av and 147 Pl.  Proceed two blocks south to Sutphin Blvd and Jamaica Av.  Use elevators to enter the Sutphin Blvd-Archer Av E/J/Z Station. If you are on the mezzanine: See a station agent to re-enter faregate and use elevator to take a Jamaica-bound E to Sutphin Blvd-Archer Av E/J/Z Station.  Use elevators to exit station and take a Lafayette Av-bound Q24 or a Williamsburg Bridge Plz-bound Q54 (Jamaica Av & Sutphin Blvd) to Jamaica-Van Wyck E Station.

notes: mezzanine to platforms for E/J/Z service in both directions
alternative_route: If you are on the mezzanine:  Use the nearby elevator to exit the station. Then take a Jamaica-bound Q24 bus (Archer Av and Sutphin Blvd) to Jamaica Center-Parsons/Archer E/J/Z station (Archer Av and 158 St).  If you are on the E platform:  Take a Jamaica-bound E to Jamaica Center-Parsons/Archer, then either:  Use the elevator to exit the station and take a Bushwick-bound Q24, Jamaica-bound Q30 or Q31, Williamsburg-bound Q54, or Broadway Junction-bound Q56 bus (Jamaica Av/Parsons Blvd) to Sutphin Blvd.  Or for J/Z, use the elevator to the lower level and board a Manhattan-bound J or Z.  If you are on the J/Z platform: Take a Jamaica-bound J or Z to Jamaica Center-Parsons/Archer, then either:  Use the elevator to exit the station and take a Bushwick-bound Q24, Jamaica-bound Q30 or Q31, Williamsburg-bound Q54, or Broadway Junction-bound Q56 bus (Jamaica Av/Parsons Blvd) to Sutphin Blvd.  Or for E, use the elevator to the upper level and board a Manhattan-bound E.

notes: Archer Ave & Parsons Blvd (SW corner) to mezzanine for service in both directions on both lines
alternative_route: If you are on the street:   Take a College Point-bound Q20 bus (Archer Av and 160 St) to Sutphin Blvd and Archer Av for E/J/Z service at the Sutphin Blvd/Archer Av-JFK Airport station.  If you are on the mezzanine:  See a station agent to re-enter through the faregate and use the elevator to take a Manhattan-bound E to Sutphin Blvd/Archer Av-JFK Airport. Then use elevators to exit the station and take a Jamaica-bound Q20 bus (Archer Av and Sutphin Blvd) to Archer Av and Parsons Blvd.

notes: mezzanine to platforms for E/J/Z service in both directions
alternative_route: If you are on the mezzanine: Exit through the faregate and use the elevator to exit the station. Then take a College Point-bound Q20 bus (Archer Av and Parsons Blvd) to Sutphin Blvd and Archer Av for E/J/Z service at the Sutphin Blvd/Archer Av-JFK Airport station.  If you are on the E platform:  Take a Manhattan-bound E to Sutphin Blvd/Archer Av-JFK Airport. Then use elevators to exit the station and take a Jamaica-bound Q20 bus (Archer Av and Sutphin Blvd) to Archer Av and Parsons Blvd.  If you are on the J/Z platform:  Take a Manhattan-bound J or Z to Sutphin Blvd/Archer Av-JFK Airport. Then use elevators to exit the station and take a Jamaica-bound Q20 bus (Archer Av and Sutphin Blvd) to Archer Av and Parsons Blvd.

notes: East of Main St & Roosevelt Ave to Manhattan-bound platform.
alternative_route: If you are on the street:  For Manhattan-bound service via LIRR: Reduced-Fare OMNY/MetroCard holders may ride LIRR between Flushing-Main St (LIRR) and Grand Central / Penn Station at no additional cost. Transfer at Woodside for Queens 7 stations. You must present your Reduced-Fare OMNY or MetroCard to the LIRR conductor onboard to use this service.  For Manhattan-bound service via bus/subway: Take a Q63 or Q66 bus to Junction Blvd and Roosevelt Av and transfer to a southbound Q72 bus to the Junction Blvd 7 station.  If you are at the platform:  Take a Manhattan-bound 7 to Junction Blvd. Exit the station and a take LaGuardia Airport-bound Q72 bus (Roosevelt Av and Junction Blvd) to Northern Blvd and Junction Blvd. Then transfer to a Flushing-bound Q63 or Q66 bus to its terminal near Flushing-Main St.

notes: Roosevelt Av & 74 St (SE corner) to Flushing Mn St-bound 7 plat & E/F/M/R/7 mezzanines.
alternative_route: If you are on the street:  For Manhattan-bound E/F/R, take a Penn Station-bound Q32 bus (Roosevelt Av at 74 St) to Queens Plaza.  For Manhattan-bound M/R, take a Penn Station-bound Q32 bus (Roosevelt Av at 74 St) to 58 St. Travel north on 58 St, east (left) on 38 Av, and north (right) on 56 St to Broadway for Manhattan-bound access at Northern Blvd M/R station.  For E, F, M, R to Forest Hills/Jamaica, take a Rockaway Park-bound Q53 SBS (Broadway at 75 St) to Woodhaven Blvd. Transfer to a Jamaica-bound Q60 bus.  For 7, proceed to bus terminal and take LaGuardia Link Q70 SBS to 61 St-Woodside.  If you are on the Manhattan-bound 7 mezzanine:  For street access, take a Manhattan-bound 7 to 61 St-Woodside. Exit station and take LaGuardia Airport-bound Q70 SBS bus or Rockaway Park-bound Q53 SBS bus (Roosevelt Av at 62 St) to Jackson Hts-Roosevelt Av/74 St-Broadway.  For E/F/R, take a Manhattan-bound 7 to Queensboro Plaza. Use elevators to exit the station and proceed east along Queens Plaza S to the Queens Plaza E/F/R station. For M/R, take a Manhattan-bound 7 to 61 St-Woodside. Use elevators to exit the station and take an Astoria-bound Q18 (Woodside Av at 61st St) to 54 St and Northern Blvd for Northern Blvd M/R station. For Forest Hills-bound service, elevator on SE corner of 54 St and Broadway. For Manhattan-bound service, elevator on NW corner of 56 St and Broadway. If you are on the transfer mezzanine:  Take an E, F or R to Queens Plaza.  For 7, use elevators to exit the station proceed west along Queens Plaza S to the Queensboro Plaza station.  To return to Jackson Heights-Roosevelt Av from Queens Plaza, take a Jackson Heights-bound Q32 bus (Queens Plaza S at 28 St) to 76 St and Roosevelt Av.  If you are on the Queens-bound 7 platform:  For street access, take a Flushing-Main St-bound 7 to Junction Blvd and transfer to a Manhattan-bound 7 to 61 St-Woodside. Exit station and take LaGuardia Airport-bound Q70 SBS bus or Rockaway Park-bound Q53 SBS bus (Roosevelt Av at 62 St) to Jackson Hts-Roosevelt Av/74 St-Broadway.  For E/F/M/R, take a Flushing-Main St-bound 7 to Junction Blvd and transfer to a Manhattan-bound 7 to Queensboro Plaza. Proceed east along Queens Plaza S to the Queens Plaza E/F/R station.

notes: transfer mezzanine to Manhattan-bound E/F/M/R platform and mezzanine for access to Queens-bound E/F/M/R service
alternative_route: The elevators serving the E/F/M/R platforms are out of service for replacement.  For E/F/M/R service from the mezzanine: Take a Manhattan-bound 7 to Queensboro Plaza and proceed east along Queens Plaza S to the Queens Plaza E/F/R station. For M to Roosevelt Island, take a Forest Hills-bound R to Northern Blvd and transfer to a Manhattan-bound M.  To exit: Take a Manhattan-bound E/F/R to Queens Plaza. Proceed west along Queens Plaza S to the Queensboro Plaza 7 station. Take a Flushing-bound 7 local train to 74 St-Broadway or take a Jackson Heights-bound Q32 bus (from Queens Plaza S/28 St) to Roosevelt Av/75 St.

alternative_route: The elevators serving the E/F/M/R platforms are out of service for replacement.  For E/F/M/R service from the mezzanine: Take a Manhattan-bound 7 to Queensboro Plaza and proceed east along Queens Plaza S to the Queens Plaza E/F/R station. To exit: Take an E/F/M/R to Forest Hills-71 Av and exit the station. Take a Manhattan-bound Q60 bus (108 St/Queens Blvd) to 59 St/Queens Blvd and then transfer to a Woodside-bound Q53 SBS to 75 St/Broadway. Jackson Heights-Roosevelt Av is one block north.

notes: mezzanine to Manhattan-bound 7 platform
alternative_route: If you are on the Manhattan-bound platform:  Take a Manhattan-bound 7 to 61 St-Woodside then either:  Transfer to a Flushing-Main St-bound 7 to 74 St-Broadway.  Or, exit station and take LaGuardia Airport-bound Q70 SBS bus or Rockaway Park-bound Q53 SBS bus (Roosevelt Av at 62 St) to Jackson Hts-Roosevelt Av/74 St-Broadway.  If you are on the Manhattan-bound 7 Mezzanine:  Exit the station and take a Woodside-bound Q70 SBS or Q53 SBS bus to 61 St/Roosevelt Av for the 61 St-Woodside 7 station.

If you are on the overpass:  Take a Flushing-bound 7 to Flushing-Main St. Use the elevator to exit the station and take a Long Island City-bound Q63 or Q66 bus (Main St and Roosevelt Av) to Northern Blvd and Junction Blvd. Transfer to a Rego Park-bound Q72 bus to Roosevelt Av and Junction Blvd.

alternative_route: If you are on the overpass: Take a Flushing-bound 7 to Flushing-Main St. Transfer on the same level to a Manhattan-bound 7 to Junction Blvd. If you are on the platform: Take a Manhattan-bound 7 to 74 St-Broadway, then either: Use elevators to transfer to a Flushing-bound 7 to Junction Blvd. Or, use elevators to exit the station and take an East Elmhurst-bound Q49 bus (74 St and Roosevelt Av) to 92 St and Astoria Blvd. Transfer to a Rego Park-bound Q72 bus to Roosevelt Av and Junction Blvd.

Or, take a Forest Hills-bound R to Northern Blvd and transfer to a Manhattan-bound R. Transfer to E/F at Queens Plaza. If you are on the platform:  Take a Manhattan-bound E or F to Forest Hills-71 Av and then either: Use elevators to take Jamaica-bound E or F to Kew Gardens-Union Tpke Station. Use elevators to exit station and take a South Jamaica-bound Q60 (Queens Blvd and 71 Av) to Union Tpke.

Then use the elevator on Kew Gardens Rd to enter the Kew Gardens/Union Tpke E/F station.  If you are on the mezzanine: See a station agent to re-enter through the faregate and use the elevator to take a Jamaica-bound E or F to Kew Gardens/Union Tpke. alternative_route: If you are on the mezzanine: Use elevator at other end of mezzanine to take Manhattan-bound EFMR to Jackson Hts/Roosevelt Av. Use elevators to transfer to Jamaica-bound EF. alternative_route: If you are on the platform: Take a northbound N or W to Astoria-Ditmars Blvd. Then remain on the train or wait at the platform for a Manhattan-bound N or W to Astoria Blvd.

notes: Mezzanine to lower platform and upper platform.

Then, transfer to an Astoria-Ditmars Blvd-bound N/W to Astoria Blvd. If you are on the Manhattan-bound platform: Take a Manhattan-bound 7 to the Court Sq station. Exit the station and proceed north along 23 St to Queens Plaza. If you are on the Queens-bound platform: Take a Flushing-Main St-bound 7 to 61 St-Woodside. Then, take a Manhattan-bound 7 to Court Sq. Exit the station and proceed north along 23 St to Queens Plaza.

Or, take an Elmhurst-bound Q52-SBS bus (Rockaway Beach Blvd and Beach 67 St) to 157 St and Cross Bay Blvd. Then, travel to 159 Ave and 103 St for the Howard Beach/JFK Airport A station.   If you are on the mezzanine:   Use EL481 to take a Far Rockaway-Mott Av-bound A train to Far Rockaway-Mott Av. Use the elevator to exit the station and take a Roxbury-bound Q22 bus (Mott Av and Beach 21 St) to Beach Channel Dr and Beach 67 St.   If you are on the platform:   Take an A train to Howard Beach-JFK Airport.   Then, either:   Use elevators to exit the station and take an Arverne-bound Q52-SBS bus (SW corner of 157 Ave and Cross Bay Blvd) to Rockaway Beach Blvd and Beach 67 St.   Or,   Use elevators to transfer to a Far Rockaway-bound A train to Far Rockaway-Mott Av. Then, Use the elevator to exit the station and take a Roxbury-bound Q22 bus (Mott Av and Beach 21 St) to Beach Channel Dr and Beach 67 St.

alternative_route: If you are on the mezzanine:   Use EL480 to exit the station. Then, take a Far Rockway Mott Av-bound Q22 bus (SW corner of Beach Channel Dr and 69 St) to Beach 21 St Terminal.

notes: NE corner of 44 Drive and 23 St to mezzanine for E/F service to Manhattan.
alternative_route: If you are on the street:  Take a Flushing-bound Q63 bus (Jackson Av at 44 Dr) to Jackson Av / Queens Blvd for the Queens Plaza E/F/R station. If you are on the platform:  Take a Manhattan-bound E or F to Lexington Av/53 St and transfer across the platform to a Jamaica-bound E or F to Queens Plaza. Exit the station and take a Court Sq-bound Q63 bus (Jackson Av at 42 Rd) to 44 Dr / Jackson Av. Proceed west along 44 Dr to 23 St for Court Sq E/F.

notes: Street (NW corner of Jamaica Ave and Woodhaven Blvd Service Rd) to Manhattan-bound platform.
alternative_route: If you are on the street: Cross Jamaica Av and take a Jamaica Center-bound J or Z to Sutphin Blvd-Archer Av. Then, transfer to a Manhattan-bound J or Z. If you are on the platform: Take a Manhattan-bound J or Z to Flushing Av (or to Marcy Av if AM rush hour). Then, transfer to a Jamaica Center-Parsons/Archer-bound J or Z to Woodhaven Blvd.

notes: Street (SW corner of Jamaica Ave and Woodhaven Blvd Service Rd) to Jamaica-bound platform.
alternative_route: If you are on the street: proceed east on Jamaica Av and board a Jamaica-170 St-bound Q56 bus.  Then either: For Sutphin Blvd-Archer Av-JFK Airport, exit the bus at Jamaica Av and 147 Place. For Jamaica Center-Parsons/ Archer, exit the bus at Jamaica Av and Parsons Blvd. If you are on the platform: Take a Jamaica Center-bound J or Z to Sutphin Blvd-Archer Av. Then, transfer to a Manhattan-bound J or Z to Woodhaven Blvd.

notes: Street (SE corner of 54 St and Broadway) to Forest Hills-bound platform
alternative_route: If you are on the street:   Take a Manhattan-bound R to Queens Plaza and transfer to a Forest Hills-bound R.  If you are on the platform:   Take a Forest Hills-bound M or R train to Jackson Hts - Roosevelt Av or Forest Hills - 71 Av and transfer to a Manhattan-bound M or R to Northern Blvd.

notes: Street (NE corner of 56t St and Broadway) to Manhattan and Brooklyn-bound platform
alternative_route: If you are on the street:  Take a Court Sq-bound Q63 bus (Northern Blvd and Broadway) to Jackson Av and Queens Plaza S for Queens Plaza E/F/R.   If you are on the platform:  Take a Manhattan-bound R to Queens Plaza and transfer to a Forest Hills-bound R to Northern Blvd.

notes: Sidewalk entrance (east of the pedestrian skybridge) to Manhattan-bound platform
alternative_route: If you are on the street: Take an Old Howard Beach-bound or Hamilton Beach-bound Q11 (Eckfor Av and Raleigh St) to 101 St and 159 Av.  Proceed east on 159th Av two blocks to Howard Beach A Station. Or, use ramp from casino to access platform. If you are on the platform: Take a Manhattan-bound A train to Euclid Av.  Use elevators to exit station. Take a Jamiaca-bound Q8 (Pitkin Av and Euclid Av) to 101 Av and Woodhaven Blvd.  Transfer to an Old Howard Beach-bound or Hamilon Beach-bound Q11 (Woodhaven Blvd and 101 Ave) to Eckford Av and Raleigh St.  Or, use ramp to casino to exit station.

alternative_route: Use an adjacent elevator.

Queens Plaza North between Crescent St and 27 St to mezzanine for service in both directions.
alternative_route: If you are on the street:  Use other elevator located at the SW corner of Queens Plaza South and Crescent St. If you are on the overpass level: Follow signs to use the other elevator which will take you to the SW corner of Queens Plaza South and Crescent St.
